title: Undertake harvest and pre-processing of medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake harvest and pre-processing of medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for harvest and pre-processing of medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Confirm harvest and pre-processing plans and specifications with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm harvest and pre-processing plans and specifications with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm harvest and pre-processing plans and specifications with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement control measures.

pcs.text: Prepare self and required approved materials, tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare self and required approved materials, tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare self and required approved materials, tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment, according to hygiene and sanitation and health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Check work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for harvest and pre-processing of medicinal cannabis

elements.title: Harvest medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Check and record weights and quantities of plants to be harvested against specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and record weights and quantities of plants to be harvested against specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and record weights and quantities of plants to be harvested against specifications.

pcs.text: Check plant health prior to commencing harvesting tasks, including any signs of disease or pests, and report abnormalities or presence of disease or pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check plant health prior to commencing harvesting tasks, including any signs of disease or pests, and report abnormalities or presence of disease or pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check plant health prior to commencing harvesting tasks, including any signs of disease or pests, and report abnormalities or presence of disease or pests.

pcs.text: Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels, according to specifications and adjust as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels, according to specifications and adjust as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels, according to specifications and adjust as required.

pcs.text: Cut flowering stems and place in harvest containers according to specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Cut flowering stems and place in harvest containers according to specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Cut flowering stems and place in harvest containers according to specifications and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Handle harvested stems in a way that minimises damage to flower and avoids contact with growing media
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle harvested stems in a way that minimises damage to flower and avoids contact with growing media?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle harvested stems in a way that minimises damage to flower and avoids contact with growing media.

pcs.text: Calculate weight of harvest stems and transfer to the drying room using safe practices and according to entry and exiting procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate weight of harvest stems and transfer to the drying room using safe practices and according to entry and exiting procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate weight of harvest stems and transfer to the drying room using safe practices and according to entry and exiting procedures.

pcs.text: Remove remaining plant material from growing media and dispose of according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove remaining plant material from growing media and dispose of according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove remaining plant material from growing media and dispose of according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Harvest medicinal cannabis

elements.title: Pre-process medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Comply with entry and exit procedures when moving in and out of the drying room according to workplace and quality requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with entry and exit procedures when moving in and out of the drying room according to workplace and quality requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with entry and exit procedures when moving in and out of the drying room according to workplace and quality requirements.

pcs.text: Apply personal hygiene and equipment sanitation procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply personal hygiene and equipment sanitation procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply personal hygiene and equipment sanitation procedures.

pcs.text: Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels, according to specifications and adjust as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels, according to specifications and adjust as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check climate control, including temperature, humidity and airflow levels, according to specifications and adjust as required.

pcs.text: De-stem flower using required equipment according to specifications and safe practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can De-stem flower using required equipment according to specifications and safe practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can De-stem flower using required equipment according to specifications and safe practices.

pcs.text: Dry remaining stems and flowers according to specifications and required climate conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dry remaining stems and flowers according to specifications and required climate conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dry remaining stems and flowers according to specifications and required climate conditions.

pcs.text: Apply milling process for extraction as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply milling process for extraction as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply milling process for extraction as required.

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of plant material waste according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and dispose of plant material waste according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and dispose of plant material waste according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data and observations according to workplace quality procedures, including any deviations in recorded quantities and weights.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label and pack product according to specifications and workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Store product safely and securely in required climate conditions until ready for distribution

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store product safely and securely in required climate conditions until ready for distribution.

pcs.text: Record required data and observations, including reports for compliance according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data and observations, including reports for compliance according to workplace procedures.
